long_description:
[COM] regional-compute-reservations high memory usage is Triggered

TIP Short Description: regional-compute-reservations is using more than 40% of its memory limit for the last 10 minutes
TIP Situation: regional-compute-reservations-5bc6677b4f-9n6fm in rias-ng-us-south-dal10-prod has reached 40% of its memory limit
